name: trove
description: Trove — an oral-history memory agent. Sit the person you love down and just let them talk; Trove keeps every name, place and story, reconciles the tellings that don't match, decides what to ask next, forgets the noise on purpose, and hands any piece of a whole life back to you years later, under a hard token budget. A real persistent-memory agent where a memory's status is its surface — set, gilded, dusted, or lit.
